proof:
by
  intro X1 X2 h_eq
  have h1 : X1 âٹ† X2 := by
    apply subset_of_val_image_eq
    exact h_eq
  have h2 : X2 âٹ† X1 := by
    apply subset_of_val_image_eq
    rw [Eq.symm h_eq]
  have h3 : X1 = X2 := Set.Subset.antisymm h1 h2
  exact h3

-- 14.
theorem val_image_eq_iff {U : Type} {A : Set U} {X1 X2 : Set A}
    : val_image A X1 = val_image A X2 â†” X1 = X2 := by
  apply Iff.intro
  آ· -- Assume val_image A X1 = val_image A X2, prove X1 = X2
    intro h_eq
    apply Set.Subset.antisymm
    آ· -- Show X1 âٹ† X2
      apply subset_of_val_image_eq
      exact h_eq
    آ· -- Show X2 âٹ† X1
      apply subset_of_val_image_eq
      rw [Eq.symm h_eq]
  آ· -- Assume X1 = X2, prove val_image A X1 = val_image A X2
    intro h_eq
    rw [h_eq]

-- 14.
theorem val_image_eq_iff {U : Type} {A : Set U} {X1 X2 : Set A}
    : val_image A X1 = val_image A X2 â†” X1 = X2 := by
  apply Iff.intro
  آ· -- Assume val_image A X1 = val_image A X2, prove X1 = X2
    intro h_eq
    apply Set.Subset.antisymm
    آ· -- Show X1 âٹ† X2
      apply subset_of_val_image_eq
      exact h_eq
    آ· -- Show X2 âٹ† X1
      apply subset_of_val_image_eq
      rw [Eq.symm h_eq]
  آ· -- Assume X1 = X2, prove val_image A X1 = val_image A X2
    intro h_eq
    rw [h_eq]

    have h_eq2 : val_image A X2 = val_image A X1 := by
      rw [h_eq]
    apply subset_of_val_image_eq
